name: Smoked Mackerel Pâté

ingredients.item: smoked mackerel or smoked trout fillets

method: add a few tablespoons of creme frakhe or heavy cream to the fish.
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
214 pounds potatoes
ounces grated good Cheddar cheese
~ a fresh red chile
To prepare your fish pie
4 sprigs of fresh Italian parsley
10 ounces salmon fillets, skin off and bones removed
10 ounces finnan haddie or cod fillets, skin off and
14 pound large shrimp, raw, peeled
optional: a good handful of spinach, chopped
optional: a couple of ripe tomatoes, quartered
Preheat the oven t o 400°F and bring a large pan of salted water to a boil. Peel the potatoes and cut into
o/4-inch chunks Once t he w ater is boiling, add your potatoes and cook for around 12 minutes, until soft
an stick your knife into them to check) • Meanwhile, get yourself a deep baking pan or earthenware
dish and stand a box grater in it • Peel t he carrot. G rate the celery, carrot, and Cheddar on the coarse
of t he grater . Use t he fine side of the grat e r t o grate the zest from the lemon. Finely grate or chop
chile . Finely chop t he parsley leaves and stalks and add these to the pan
To cook and serve your fish pie
Cut the salmon and finnan haddie or cod into bite-size chunks and add to the pan with the shrimp •
Squeeze over t he juice from t he zested lemon (no seeds please!), drizzle with olive oil, and add a good pinch
salt and pepper . If you want to add any spinach or tomatoes, do it now. Mix everything together really
By now your potatoes should be cooked, so drain them in a colander and return them to the pan
• Drizzle with a couple of good lugs of olive oil and add a pinch of salt and pepper. Mash until nice and
smooth, then spread evenly over the top of the fish and grated veggies • Place in the preheated oven for
40 minut es, or until cooked through, crispy, and golden on top. Serve piping hot with tomato
ketchup, bake d beans, steamed vegetables, or a lovely green salad
CLASSIC FISH 285
This is a delicious dish which I like to eat for breakfast or dinner. Don't be put off because you have to
poach the fish, peel the hard-boiled eggs, and cook the rice - yes, it's a bit of a bother, but it should
take you 20 minutes to do.
